title: Dazzling Greek Chickpea Tagine
description: A vibrant Greek-inspired chickpea tagine with crispy falafel, tangy lemon, and aromatic herbs, cooked swiftly in a kadhai for a monsoon-ready meal.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a kadhai over medium heat.
Add sliced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in diced tomato, cook until soft, about 4 minutes.
Add the chickpeas and falafel mix, mixing well to coat with onion-tomato base.
Sprinkle oregano, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper, stir for 1 minute.
Pour in 2 tbsp fresh lemon juice, mix, and cook for another 2 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Remove from heat, stir in 3 tbsp Greek yogurt until smooth and creamy.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, adding more salt or lemon if desired.
Serve hot straight from the kadhai, garnished with a drizzle of olive oil if desired.
